description_long: This house features a striking modern design with a bold black-and-white striped exterior and a boxy geometric form. The structure is complemented by a fenced-in yard that includes a green lawn, a yellow slide, and a swing set, suggesting a family-friendly environment. The front facade is defined by a large rectangular opening, likely serving as a covered porch or entryway, and minimalistic window placements. The property is enclosed by a combination of black picket fencing and a brick wall, providing both security and visual contrast. The roof is flat and continues the striped motif, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout integrates outdoor play space with a visually impactful architectural style.
description: A modern, boxy house with bold black-and-white stripes, flat roof, and a fenced yard featuring a yellow slide and swing set. The property is enclosed by a mix of black picket fencing and brick wall, emphasizing a contemporary family-friendly design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the striped house, fenced yard, yellow slide, and swing set, with both picket and brick fencing visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large rectangular opening, and the slide leading into the yard, with the brick wall in the foreground.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the striped facade, yard, and playground equipment, with the brick wall and picket fence clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the flat striped roof and the back of the house, with minimal yard features visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Large rectangular opening with a covered porch, minimalistic door, no visible steps or decorative columns
